0.text: Thickening of the pleura with calcified foci

1.text: Nodular thickening at the major fissure, measuring 2.5 cm at its thickest point

2.text: Fibrotic changes in the inferior lingular segment and superior segment of the left lower lobe

3.text: Paraseptal emphysematous changes at the apices of both lungs

4.text: Multiple calcified and subcentimeter nodules in both lungs
